description: A motion graphics designer needs to create a morphing animation where a geometric object smoothly transitions between three shapes using Blender's Shape Keys system. Using the 'MorphCube' mesh in the provided scene, create a Basis shape key and two additional shape keys named 'Spherical' (transforming the cube into a sphere) and 'Stretched' (scaling the cube by 2.5 on the Z axis). Animate these shape keys over a 60-frame timeline (Start: 1, End: 60) such that the object is in its base shape at frame 1, fully spherical at frame 30, and a tall column at frame 60. Save the project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/morph_animation.blend.
